_comment: Hand-editable. Reported/estimated TOTAL company revenue run-rate (ARR-equivalent) for AI labs, used ONLY for the ARR-bridge panel. Every figure is a press/analyst estimate unless the lab stated it. OpenRouter-implied $ is a DIFFERENT, much smaller thing (developer API spend routed through OpenRouter at list price) — the bridge shows OR-$ as a % of these to reveal how thin/representative the OpenRouter slice is. Edit values as new prints land; keep source+asof.
_units: arr_busd = total company run-rate revenue in USD billions (annualized)

openai.source: Multiple press (valueaddvc, useluminix, futuresearch), Jun 2026: ~$25B annualized (~$2B/mo), enterprise >40%

anthropic.source: Company Series-H announcement 2026-05-28 run-rate ~$47B; July 2026 press (NextBigFuture) reports up to ~$69B; wiki corpus: The Information ~$50B (Jun 2026)

google.source: No clean standalone ARR (embedded in Alphabet). $1.2B Gemini subscriptions FY25; GenAI-product revenue +~800% YoY; Gemini API ~2.4M devs, ~16B tok/min (Q1-26)

x-ai.source: Bloomberg/Sacra mid-2026: ~$0.5B AI-only ARR (SuperGrok+API+enterprise); FY25 ~$0.35B; FY26 target ~$2B

deepseek.source: The Information / PYMNTS mid-2026: annualized ~$400-500M (mostly API); raised >$7.4B at >$50B val (Jun 2026)

mistralai.source: getlatka/mlq Jan 2026: ~$400M ARR; target >$1B by EoY26; ~$23B val

qwen.source: Embedded in Alibaba Cloud; no clean standalone ARR

meta.source: Open-weight; monetized indirectly, no LLM ARR

nvidia.source: Models are open-weight demos; revenue is hardware, not model API

tencent.source: Embedded in Tencent; no clean standalone LLM ARR

xiaomi.source: Embedded in Xiaomi; no clean standalone LLM ARR

openrouter.source: Menlo Ventures ('>1 quadrillion tokens/yr'); Sacra (~$50M OR ARR Mar-26 @ ~5% take => ~$1B inference spend); Jun-26 snapshot ~$76M monthly spend
